discovery.text: Retro-chic boutique hotel with garden courtyard and mid-century West Coast style. Converted 1956 motor inn with Instagram-worthy palm-lined courtyard. 3 blocks from Robson Street, walkable to everything. On-site coffee shop. ~$180-220 CAD/night in April — right in Billy's budget. TripAdvisor Travelers' Choice. Rating 4.3/5 (1,241 reviews). THE top pick for funky + affordable + location.
